steps.title: Read the underlined sentence
steps.content: The underlined sentence says the evidence is exciting because it could help researchers understand how M. symmetrica relates to other arthropods. It explains the significance of the possible synganglion finding.

steps.title: Reject incorrect functions
steps.content: Choice A says the sentence challenges the team's claims, but it supports their significance. Choice B gives a definition that appeared earlier. Choice D falsely separates cave crickets from arthropods.

steps.title: Choose the significance
steps.content: The sentence explains why finding a possible synganglion matters for understanding relationships among arthropods. The answer is C.
